summary: All standard math operations (ADD, MULTIPLY, DIVIDE, POWER, etc.) map directly to Unity Math node. No approximations needed.

node_structure.optional: Use Clamp (Boolean) - add Clamp(0,1) node if needed

implementation: Direct - create Math node, set Operation property, wire inputs
validation: Operation name matches Unity Math operations
Both inputs connected for binary ops
Single input for unary ops (SQRT, FLOOR, etc.)
